[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1000100000 2
1 1010101010 5
2 0100000010 2
3 1111100110 7
4 0111101011 7
5 1110110000 5
6 1110100000 4
7 0110111010 6

01 10 0110111001 6
12 21 1110011111 8
23 32 1101011111 8
34 43 0001011111 6
45 54 1001011111 7
56 65 1111010101 7
67 76 0110011010 5
70 07 0110111010 6 match 7

02 20 1110111110 8
13 31 0111001111 7
24 42 1101011111 8
35 53 1001001111 6
46 64 0111011111 8
57 75 1101001111 7
60 06 0110111000 5
71 17 0110001011 5

03 30 0011111111 8
14 41 0111011111 8
25 52 1101011111 8
36 63 0111011111 8
47 74 0101011111 7
50 05 1011111101 8
61 16 0110011001 5
72 27 1100011110 6

04 40 0011111111 8
15 51 1111001101 7
26 62 1110011110 7
37 73 0101001111 6
